chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D 792 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.529/2025 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 16-01-2025. Mr. Ashiq Muhammad, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Kamran, AAG 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. The prayer clause herein reads as follows: “a. To pass order to restrain the respondents not to interfere in the Lease land of petitioners No.1, 40-00 acres Land from NC No.344 of deh joreji Bin Qasim Malir Lease to petitioner No.1 and petitioner No.2 Lease Land of 48- 00 Acres Land from NC No.311 of deh Joreji Bin Qasim Malir Karachi. And Lease Land 12 Acres from NC No.344 of deh Joreji Bin Qasim Malir Karachi. b. To pass order to direct the Respondent No.1 after permission from the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan to extend Lease of the petitioners and not allotted/Lease except petitioners. c. Any other relief(s) which this Honorable Court deems fit according to circumstance of the case.” Learned counsel for the petitioners was confronted as to how issues pertaining to entitlement, possession etc. of immovable property could be entertained in writ jurisdiction. He remained unable to assist. Even otherwise matters requiring inquiry, investigation, evidence etc. are not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Nadeem
